name: tech-tools
description: Henssler IT domain-cluster plugins: MSP operations, security and compliance, Microsoft 365, HR/payroll, finance, plus engineering, design, data, support, product, and productivity, with the atlas multi-agent coding meta-agent. Each vendor tool is bundled into the business domain it serves.

plugins.name: atlas
plugins.description: Atlas is a self-configuring multi-agent coding architect. Boots on /atlas and SessionStart: 18-agent squad, 7 automation hooks, atlas-engine methodology (research -> test -> validate -> implement -> verify; evidence before any done claim), and 16 verification-gated /atlas-* launchers. Eight skills: atlas-engine (orchestration), atlas-architect (boot/discovery), atlas-cartographer (architecture map + structural dedup), atlas-sextant (measurable self-improvement via observability DB), atlas-orbit (recurring loops), atlas-harbor (vendor MCP connectors), atlas-expedition (app-discovering UX swarm), atlas-survey (comprehensive quality/security/OWASP audit). Integrates claude-mem and context-mode; recommends skills/plugins/MCPs the project needs.

plugins.name: it-operations
plugins.description: MSP IT operations across RMM, PSA, networking, and backup. Bundles NinjaOne (RMM), ConnectWise Manage PSA (tickets, time, agreements), Auvik (network monitoring), and Kaseya Spanning (M365/Google backup), plus core operations skills: change management, process optimization, resource planning, risk assessment, compliance tracking, and vendor management.

plugins.name: security-compliance
plugins.description: Security and compliance operations. Bundles Vanta (SOC 2/ISO/HIPAA GRC), KnowBe4 (security awareness), ThreatLocker (zero-trust endpoint), and Blumira (SIEM and detection), alongside core audit-readiness, evidence-gap, risk-heatmap, and approval-triage skills.

plugins.name: microsoft-365
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 administration and identity. Bundles native M365 management (users, mailboxes, Teams, OneDrive, licensing, security posture), Microsoft Graph and Entra reporting, and CIPP multi-tenant management (tenant health, standards drift, secure score, offboarding).

plugins.name: hr-payroll
plugins.description: HR and payroll operations. Bundles Paylocity (roster snapshots, new-hire flow, pay-rate and deduction/tax audits) plus core HR skills: compensation benchmarking, recruiting pipeline, interview prep, org planning, people analytics, and employee handbook authoring.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Finance and accounting skills: financial close, journal entry prep, reconciliation, variance analysis, financial statements, and SOX audit workflows.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Software engineering skills: code review, system design, incident response, testing strategy, and tech-debt management, plus Cowork plugin authoring and customization tooling.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Review accessibility, critique designs, manage design systems, write UX copy, and synthesize user research for product and design teams.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Explore datasets, write SQL queries, validate data quality, build visualizations, and generate interactive dashboards.

plugins.name: customer-support
plugins.description: Triage tickets, draft responses, research customer questions, manage escalations, and build knowledge-base articles for support teams.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Write feature specs, plan roadmaps, and synthesize user research faster. Keep stakeholders updated and stay ahead of the competitive landscape.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Workplace productivity utilities: two-tier memory management and task tracking, plus enterprise search and knowledge synthesis, PDF viewing/form-filling/signing, brand-voice enforcement, and nudge reminders.
